data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) merge commit 7afe39ea6273 is HEAD of origin/main containing impl commit ab19e0fb1dff; (2) all three commit tags present (9082028272b8, ab19e0fb1dff, 7afe39ea6273); (3) no invariants to check; (4) CI and Coverage Badge both passed with conclusion=success on merge commit; (5) diff is correctly scoped — 7 files changed across schemas, settings UI, beats page, terminal-manager, and settings tests. The prior stale-cache issue (rejected in earlier impl review) is fixed via queryClient.invalidateQueries on save. No regressions detected.
